title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How much time a day do you spend on social media?
What do you think are the main benefits of social media?
Do you think social media has made people more or less connected?
Have you ever taken a break from social media? How did it feel?
Do you think young people share too much personal information online?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think social media has a mostly positive or negative effect on young people?
Should there be an age limit for using social media? Why?
How important is privacy in the digital age?
